queries.question: Please provide both opinion pieces and featured articles where either was included in volume 01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Article.title 
FROM Article
WHERE (Article.news_content_type = "Opinion Piece" OR Article.news_content_type = "Feature Article") AND Article.volume = "01"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?article p:news_content_type ?news_content_type_w .
  ?article p:news_content_type ?news_content_type_w2 .
  ?article p:volume ?volume_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?news_content_type_w) = "Opinion Piece" || STR(?news_content_type_w2) = "Feature Article")) && (STR(?volume_w) = "01" || STR(?volume_w) = "1" || STR(?volume_w) = "1.0")))
}

queries.question: Please provide all opinion pieces and featured articles from volume 01.
queries.sql:
SELECT Article.title 
FROM Article
WHERE Article.news_content_type = "Opinion Piece" OR Article.news_content_type = "Feature Article" AND Article.volume = "01"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?article a :Articles .
  ?article p:title ?title .
  ?article p:news_content_type ?news_content_type_w .
  ?article p:news_content_type ?news_content_type_w2 .
  ?article p:volume ?volume_w .
  FILTER((STR(?news_content_type_w) = "Opinion Piece" || (STR(?news_content_type_w2) = "Feature Article" && (STR(?volume_w) = "01" || STR(?volume_w) = "1" || STR(?volume_w) = "1.0"))))
}
